title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates six "power phrases" claimed to accelerate development with Claude Code, citing endorsements from Claude's creator and Andrej Karpathy. He identifies one common phrase that he warns costs time and money, positioning strategic prompting as a force multiplier for productivity.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six prompting phrases he claims speed up development with Claude Code, citing endorsements from Claude's creator and Andrej Karpathy. He also flags one commonly used phrase that he argues wastes time and money. The framing treats strategic prompting as a productivity multiplier rather than a cosmetic tweak.
